inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 OCF $159.7M less est. maintenance capex ~$60M = ~$100M ÷ 47.0M Class A shares
inputs.normalization_note: Merchant infrastructure — no regulated RAB. Maintenance capex estimated (~25% of growth capex); LLC/Class B structure means economic attribution is approximate. Q1 2026 run-rate Adj EBITDA ~$412M not used as starting FCF.

bear.notes: Delaware rig count −30%, volume cliff, deleveraging overhang, sponsor conflict

base.notes: Mid-cycle volumes, Speedway Phase II, maintenance FCF yield ~6.9% + growth

bull.notes: Sustained Permian water intensity, producer-owned system acquisitions, deleveraging + distributions
